Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.name: supportedSemantics
Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: The semantics that are fully supported by this module.

Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: The underlying semantics which this meta machine follows.

Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: The name of the machine.

Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: The accepting states of the machine.

Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.name: states
Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: All states within the machine.

Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.name: dependencies
Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: All machines that this machine depends on

Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.name: attributes
Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: A list of attributes specifying additional fields that can change.

Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.name: metaData
Structs/MetaMachine.html#/s:12MetaMachin.abstract: A list of attributes specifying additional fields that do not change.
